titleStmt.title: SII 5.1275: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 1275. (A.R. No. 373-L of 1896). TO THE LEFT OF THE ABOVE INSCRIPTION.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrīśākava¨rṣē viśikhaśarasudhādhāmadhātrīsamētē yōghē caṁdrā¨rkkatāraṁ pratibha sa¨rvvamā
sōtsavasya . śrīkū¨rmmasvāmibhaktyā munirakhilajanānaṁdana ścitsukhākhya(ḥ)staddēvaggrāmavā
ṭīdvitayamitabhuvō dāpayāmāsa mūlyaṁ . ni¨rvvighna(ṁ)nni¨rvvahatvēṣa dha¨rmmaṁ kū¨rmmaprabhō ma
ma .tvāṁ yācē nīcabhāvēna yatastvaṁ prātthitā¨rtthadaḥ . svasti śrī . śakava¨rṣaṁbu 1155 nēṇṭi śrēṣṭā
māsamu mōdalugā śrīkū¨rmmanāthadēvaru lakṣmībhūmisahitamugā māsaṁprati bharaṇi nakṣatra
mu balipradānapū¨rvvakamu grāmapradakṣiṇamu vēṁcēyuṭakunu Āragiṁcciḍi nivēdyamulu Ē
ḍunu Appamulu 5 lu padiyunu neI tū meṁḍunaḍḍayunu ceṟakuṁguḍmu palamulu
padiyunu miriyālu mānayunu ṁḍru dūmuṁḍunu viḍiyālapōṁkkalu munnūṟunu Ā
kulu Ēḍu gaṭṭuṁ gavalyayunu ka¨rppūramu Ettu reṁḍu vādikalunu caṁddanamu Arapalamunu
maḷiyalālu puṣpālu mānyatō paina dattamulu Ācaṁdrā¨rkkamu selluṭaku citsu
khabhaṭṭārakulaina śrīnarasiṁhamahāmunulu śrībhaṁḍāramuna noḍkina gaṁḍa
paṁḍreṁḍumāḍayu nēsusinnālaku nīyūri jeṁḍarumuceṟvukriṁdda niruviṭicavukabhūmi
phalabhōgamunaṁdu pratisaṁvatsaramu māsaṁprati sellaṁggalayadi .
Digital edition of SII 5.1275 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
